rationale: The agent correctly read Issue #3 and attempted to create docs/faq.md (receiving the expected 403 due to read-only PAT). However, the agent did NOT attempt to update sidebars.js as required by the task. Instead of making the actual tool call to update sidebars.js, the agent only provided instructions in the final answer. The expected behavior required both docs/faq.md creation and sidebars.js modification, but only one of the two required writes was attempted. This constitutes a partial attempt that falls short of task completion.
